faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sreekavitha Engineering College for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sreekavitha Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed a Bachelor Degree of minimum 3 years duration (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech. / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages) with 50% marks (45% marks for SC and ST categories). The qualifying Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program/Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013. Candidates who are appearing for the final year degree examination shall also be eligible. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 03rd April, 2002). No maximum age limit.
UG Diploma Candidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

faqs.question: Does Sreekavitha Engineering College has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Sreekavitha Engineering College has been rated 3.2 for faculty as per reviews by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: How is the infrastructure at Sreekavitha Engineering College? What are the facilities available for students?
faqs.answer: Sreekavitha Engineering College has been rated 3.8 on Infrastructure parameter. Institute has a well supported campus with facilities such as Auditorium, Cafeteria, Library, Shuttle Service, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus. Sreekavitha Engineering College has also been rated 3.9 for Campuslife.

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Founded in 2001, Sreekavitha Engineering College is a private institute. It is located in Khammam, Telangana. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Sreekavitha Engineering College provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 14 courses across specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and UG Diploma. Sreekavitha Engineering College fees ranges between INR 44,700 to 2,24,000. The student intake for these courses is 990. Sreekavitha Engineering College offers these course across fields such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. Sreekavitha Engineering College offers all the campus facilities to students.

faqs.answer: A:    Sreekavitha Engineering College has been rated 2.2 on placements.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Sreekavitha Engineering College?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sreekavitha Engineering College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 44,700 to 2,24,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM.

faqs.answer: A:    Sreekavitha Engineering College has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, UG Diploma which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Sreekavitha Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mining Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, UG Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mining Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Sreekavitha Engineering College?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Sreekavitha Engineering College are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Sreekavitha Engineering College goes up to 870.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of the faculty, and good placements this year.

review_content.Placements: Only a few students were placed in our course and no packages were offered for our course not only our course but also other courses, no companies come to our college and none got the internship. The worst college and I prefer not to join this average college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are not bad and faculty and the teaching is not proper and canteen is not good. Sports and games are played once in the college and the first aid kit is only under medical facilities and the hostel and mess are only for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with very good lab and infrastructure, library, nice teaching skills of teachers, etc.

review_content.Placements: There are no campus placements in this college. There are no campus placements for mining engineering in this college. None of the companies visits our college to recruit mining engineering students. All students get 30 days of internships in SCCL.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a very good and nice infrastructure in our college. There is a very good library, and all branch books are available in it. There is a very pleasant environment in the library, and it is a good place all over the college. There are excellent labs, and all the equipment are available in it. There are nice lab in-charges. I am not a hosteller and a day scholar. There is a very good canteen, where the food is served at a very high cost. Our college has a huge ground, and only cricket is played on it. There are no other indoor games, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the teaching and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In my college during my bath 2012- 2016 no companies came for campus placements. But after my batch some companies came to my college they gave package around 12000 per month. They are BPO companies. Some of those companies asked to sign bond. Few students joined mostly did not join.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no wi-fi in college but infrastructure in my department was good. Classrooms are very vast and spacious. Library is abundant of books but they give only 3 books for a semester. If you pay extra money for books they give all books. There is no hostel in my college. In every week for two hours they give game hour. There is big ground and Indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied because of the faculty and no placements.

review_content.Placements: We are 2013 passed out batch. Our college management never arranged for any placement drives for our course in our college. No one from our course got placed through our college. We faced a lot of difficulties to get a job due to the negligence of college management in arranging for placement drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best thing I liked in our college was its library. We had a very good library with good infrastructure. Our college management provided books written by various authors and other journals. We also have a good computer lab and a huge playground in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Sree Kavitha Engineering College is the best for electrical engineering.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very poor. No company visited the college for placements, and no student got placed through campus placements. The salary offered ranged from Rs. 10,000-40,000 per month. Average students got internships from college. The stipend offered for one year is Rs. 6,000. My seniors didn't get placed in any company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Students are not allowed to use mobile phones in the college. Labs are excellent, especially for electrical students. All the labs are available. We play sports every day. Every year, the college conducts a tournament. The canteen is very bad, and the food is too expensive.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the placements.

review_content.Placements: The college invites companies for placements, but the students don't get placed. Students will receive offer letters, but when we go to Hyderabad or Bangalore to join the company, the students can't even find the company at the given address.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. We have good buildings compared to other colleges in this area. The college has an excellent central library. The college is well-maintained, and it is very clean.
review_content.Faculty: Some faculty members are good, and some are not that good. They hire B.Tech graduates to teach some subjects. There are no proper faculty members for some subjects. In the civil and mechanical branches, the final year students will teach the first year students.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the faculty, and good placements this year.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not bad and faculty and the teaching is not proper and canteen is not good. Sports and games are played once in the college and the first aid kit is only under medical facilities and the hostel and mess are only for girls.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with very good lab and infrastructure, library, nice teaching skills of teachers, etc.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good and nice infrastructure in our college. There is a very good library, and all branch books are available in it. There is a very pleasant environment in the library, and it is a good place all over the college. There are excellent labs, and all the equipment are available in it. There are nice lab in-charges. I am not a hosteller and a day scholar. There is a very good canteen, where the food is served at a very high cost. Our college has a huge ground, and only cricket is pl...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no wi-fi in college but infrastructure in my department was good. Classrooms are very vast and spacious. Library is abundant of books but they give only 3 books for a semester. If you pay extra money for books they give all books. There is no hostel in my college. In every week for two hours they give game hour. There is big ground and Indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the faculty and no placements.
reviews.review_text: The best thing I liked in our college was its library. We had a very good library with good infrastructure. Our college management provided books written by various authors and other journals. We also have a good computer lab and a huge playground in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Sree Kavitha Engineering College is the best for electrical engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Students are not allowed to use mobile phones in the college. Labs are excellent, especially for electrical students. All the labs are available. We play sports every day. Every year, the college conducts a tournament. The canteen is very bad, and the food is too expensive.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. We have good buildings compared to other colleges in this area. The college has an excellent central library. The college is well-maintained, and it is very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have all the labs for each and individual department. All the labs are well-maintained. We have a very good central library in the college. Free Wi-Fi is also available in the library to browse any data. We also have the ground for some of the sports, and they will conduct tournaments also.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with better facilities
reviews.review_text:
We have a good infrastructure in the college.
We have a central library and good labs for all branches. We have different blocks for different branches, a good canteen and a good playground. There is also a garden and a lawn.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities are good. We have all the labs for all the branches. Excellent lab facilities and excellent infrastructure. We have a canteen. We have a ground. We have multiple blocks as the administrative block and a separate block for computer science and IT. 
There are separate blocks for civil and mechanical.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good. Wi-Fi and Internet speed is not very good but is efficient enough. Classrooms are having projectors for video lectures and the library is equipped with more than 35,000 volumes. There is an encouragement for sports and games and transportation is available for all students.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text:
Labs are good and moderate. Wi-Fi and internet speed is not very good but efficient. Classrooms have projectors for video lectures and the library is equipped with more than 35,000 volumes.
There is an encouragement for sports and games. Transportation is available for all students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The labs are good.
Wi-Fi and Internet speed is not very good but okay.
The classrooms have projectors for video lectures and the library is equipped with more than 35,000 volumes.
The college encourages students for sports and games.
Transportation is available for all the students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled up to a speed of 15 mbps. The library has 40,000 books, 5000 titles, CDs, national and international journals. All classrooms are well decorated and equipped with LCDs and OHPs. It has a big ground to organize cricket tournaments, volleyball tournaments. Labs are good too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not so preferable.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a very good environment with high-speed Wi-Fi. Labs have superpower machines and high-speed responsive. There are separate departments with special staff. Food served in the hostel is good. The hostel is clean and well-ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: Simply It is like temple.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is there for free only, the labs were so nice, every Friday sports and games were organised. The classrooms are neat, In the library, so many books are there, all the books are available. In canteen the food was very good they are providing quality food for us.

review_content.General: Money Minded Policies & Less Interested in Innovation!! Did nothing good for their students. Campus Infrastructure is good. Faculties are helpful. But, there is no growth. reviews_list.review_title: James college of engineering and technology review.

review_content.Placements: We are provided with the placement from a production core company. The company Was quite good and we get a good experience there. We are provided with a placement training where we can get a better knowledge about the placement. Aptitude Question and reasoning Question are practiced in our session of placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The College is provided with a Good environment and Neat classrooms. The library is neat and tidy arranged with Several number of useful books. Having a wide play ground at the centre. Provided with a neat hostel room. The environment here is completely fine and it provides us a green nature.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2012
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: Worst college, if there is any minus rating, I will surely hit that button. They are very tricky people. They will give RS 20,000 to agents who brought you there. Don’t fall in their promises, even the prospectus is fake. There are no permanent lecturers and internal evaluation is not proper. I am from Kerala, I feel discrimination from some teachers, and they show more empathy towards Tamil students in every possible way. There was no placement programme, career assistance, project assistance, no industry-linked programmes, no exhibitions, industry visit, no paper presentation, no case studies and nothing that can stimulate interpersonal skill needed by a management graduate. Plus points: good hostel and food, good library (no E library). Joining this college will put your future in a black hole.

faqs.answer: James College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent in relevant stream. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: James college of engineering and technology review.

content.Placements: We are provided with the placement from a production core company. The company Was quite good and we get a good experience there. We are provided with a placement training where we can get a better knowledge about the placement. Aptitude Question and reasoning Question are practiced in our session of placement.
content.Infrastructure: The College is provided with a Good environment and Neat classrooms. The library is neat and tidy arranged with Several number of useful books. Having a wide play ground at the centre. Provided with a neat hostel room. The environment here is completely fine and it provides us a green nature.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2012

content.Other: Worst college, if there is any minus rating, I will surely hit that button. They are very tricky people. They will give RS 20,000 to agents who brought you there. Don’t fall in their promises, even the prospectus is fake. There are no permanent lecturers and internal evaluation is not proper. I am from Kerala, I feel discrimination from some teachers, and they show more empathy towards Tamil students in every possible way. There was no placement programme, career assistance, project assistance, no industry-linked programmes, no exhibitions, industry visit, no paper presentation, no case studies and nothing that can stimulate interpersonal skill needed by a management graduate. Plus points: good hostel and food, good library (no E library). Joining this college will put your future in a black hole.

review_content.General: The infrastructure of our college is good, as it is outside the city, there is greenery all around. Our college does not support any sports and games, but it has all the facilities for sports. There are no Wi-Fi and medical facilities, but college has good labs to work in. Hostel rooms are the best compared to any college, with attached washrooms, and there are only three persons per room.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: Firstly I like my college due to its peaceful environment as I live in Chandigarh. Infrastructure is very good, beautiful environment, but the main point is study like other our colleges our college is also focusing on theory not on practical due to which me or my other friends are facing a problem of unemployment because we don't have practical knowledge which is required in the job as they offer us 8000-10000 for 12 hours per day which creates lots of frustration. Placement is good only for CSE, ECE and EEE, but it is equally bad in case of mechanical and civil. Not even a single company come in our campus. Teachers are very good and supportive and will definitely help you. Sports facilities are available but they don't allow you to play because they are quite strict. No one knows about this college and PTU is bull shit. They don’t know how to check exams. Please do your with some reputed college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The worst Decision of my life.

review_content.Placements: I have not gone through that phase yet, but I had many friends among seniors, who were not satisfied with the placements and all. Placements are usually offered by low class private ferms who asked them for a labour kind of job and our college with proudness tells every single student that thay have got Dell, Mitsubishi and other renovened companies coming up for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has a lot of land with only three tall old buildings which are not maintained properly. There is electricity as well as water issues around here. They never provide the basic amenity for the students, how can they maintain the infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Gian Jyoti Group of Institutions a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Gian Jyoti Group of Institutions is a well-known institution for B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Gian Jyoti Group of Institutions has a rating of 2.6 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2 on campuslife, 1.5 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 2.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Gian Jyoti Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty but really disappointed with placements and crowd.

content.Placements: Placement options are not good in our college. Very few companies visit the college for placements. There is no TPO available in our college for placement purposes. Our college does not provide on-campus placements. Only 5% of our seniors got placed by our college. The average salary was about Rs. 5-10 thousands per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, as it is outside the city, there is greenery all around. Our college does not support any sports and games, but it has all the facilities for sports. There are no Wi-Fi and medical facilities, but college has good labs to work in. Hostel rooms are the best compared to any college, with attached washrooms, and there are only three persons per room.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: Firstly I like my college due to its peaceful environment as I live in Chandigarh. Infrastructure is very good, beautiful environment, but the main point is study like other our colleges our college is also focusing on theory not on practical due to which me or my other friends are facing a problem of unemployment because we don't have practical knowledge which is required in the job as they offer us 8000-10000 for 12 hours per day which creates lots of frustration. Placement is good only for CSE, ECE and EEE, but it is equally bad in case of mechanical and civil. Not even a single company come in our campus. Teachers are very good and supportive and will definitely help you. Sports facilities are available but they don't allow you to play because they are quite strict. No one knows about this college and PTU is bull shit. They don’t know how to check exams. Please do your with some reputed college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The worst Decision of my life.

content.Placements: I have not gone through that phase yet, but I had many friends among seniors, who were not satisfied with the placements and all. Placements are usually offered by low class private ferms who asked them for a labour kind of job and our college with proudness tells every single student that thay have got Dell, Mitsubishi and other renovened companies coming up for placements.
content.Infrastructure: College has a lot of land with only three tall old buildings which are not maintained properly. There is electricity as well as water issues around here. They never provide the basic amenity for the students, how can they maintain the infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: A good college to gain quality knowledge and grow

content.Placements: A good college for grasping knowledge. The placement is quite good. About 40 - 50 % of students got placed this year with pretty good packages. The average package given to students was about 5-6 lacs per annum. It totally depends on the practical knowledge of the students. Moreover if the students have good passion for their subject they don't have to worry, they will get placed in a good company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good with the best studying environment. The classrooms are well maintained and air conditioners are there in every classroom and the hostel is connected with centralised AC. The food given to the students is tasty and good for the health of students. The labs are also well maintained especially the practical labs and all the equipments are available in a good working condition. The whole campus is connected with Wi-Fi. The campus is situated in a village surrounded by different kinds of trees with availability of fresh air. All important facilities are available there. I spend years there and I did not face any problem related to the infrastructure.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. reviews.review_heading: Review of Bangalore Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and beautiful. Our college provides good facilities. Our college is spread over 12 acres of land. They provide different blocks; classrooms are neat. Wi-Fi facilities are available in our college, and we have a huge playground. The hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice facilities and the best books are available.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome and attractive as well. High-speed Internet with Wi-Fi is available. Labs are large, and many computers are provided for our course. Hostel facilities are also provided, along with the best food at the Mess and Canteen. Maggi is the most popular food item at our Canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good lab equipments are available in the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in the department are good, and each classroom is maintained neatly and provided with Wi-Fi facilities. The labs have good equipment, and the library has all the books. Hostel facilities are available at the college. The mess in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it's a very good college for nursing.
reviews.review_text: The Bangalore group of institutions has a nursing school, and some say it has good infrastructure and clinical facilities. Some also say the hostel and food are of good quality. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and students can access high-speed internet from anywhere on the campus. The labs at the Bangalore Group of Institutions are well-equipped with the latest technology and tools that help students gain practical knowledge and experience. The classrooms are spacious. At the Big Library, all book...

reviews.review_heading: The Bangalore group of Institutions provides good education.
reviews.review_text: Spacious classrooms with comfortable seating. Well-stocked library with a vast collection of books, journals, and other resources related to nursing education. High-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. Auditorium for seminars, workshops, and other events. Sports facilities for various indoor and outdoor games. The mess provides healthy and vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in our area.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. Around 60 students can accommodate in each classroom. There is a decent library in this college. Hostel facilities are good. The food quality is decent. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Waste of time and worst college ever.

review_content.Placements: No placements offered in this college. Once placements are opened only fake company came to this college. If u pay money then they will select you. Their priority is money. Salary offered 2.2lakh per annum. The lowest offered is 1.8lakh per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college provides a big library, big ground almost 20 acres of land for sports, a big library is there. The college infrastructure is good. There is no Wi-Fi available at my campus. Classrooms are very good. Hostel rooms are maintained very well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Satyanarayana Engineering College (SSNEC).

review_content.Placements: About 35% of the students in our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top MNC companies like Accenture, Dell, HCL, IBM, Infosys, TCS and Amazon visit our campus for placements. Top roles, like developer and HR, are offered to the students. The salary package offered in our course ranges between 2.5-7 LPA. Many students from our course got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: All type of facilities is available for the students. The chairman sir take the personal interest about the students. Food served to the students is average, and you can manage in the mess. Medical facilities are available. Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. It offers natural air throughout the day because of the paddy fields, which is covered by the entire college behind. The campus has a good ground, where we can play games like cricket, volleyball and badminton. The college also has a good canteen. Food served to the students is not bad, and you can also find some junk food.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sri Satyanarayana Engineering College (SSNEC) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sri Satyanarayana Engineering College (SSNEC) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.MCACandidate must have passed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.

overview_faqs.question: Is Daita Madhusudana Sastry Sri Venkateswara Hindu College of Engineering good?
overview_faqs.answer: Daita Madhusudana Sastry Sri Venkateswara Hindu College of Engineering is quite a good college. Its courses in engineering are offered under a vast range of categories, and the training also is conducted with a dominant focus on practical education alongside industry readiness. The staff is excellent, and so is the learning culture. However, there are problems of placement and quality infrastructure affecting a few students. Although this college provides a lot of extracurricular activities and, of course, an inspiring environment, it would not be equal to some of the good engineering colleges, which hold prime ranks. Depending upon his requirements and further needs for their career, every student is supposed to assess this place.

faqs.answer:
A:    JEI Mathaajee College of Engineering (JEI MCE, Kanchipuram) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category).
The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE.

Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The college is quite good for the comprehensive growth of students.

review_content.Placements: The highest amount of placements are observed in our field, which was about 35%, because the majority of the students want to study further. The highest salary package offered is 3.6 LPA by a company from Ahmedabad for an assistant app developer. The lowest salary package offered by several local companies of our town is 2-3 LPA. Some students were hired as assistant developers, whereas few got a job in the teaching department.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite well-balanced. Each classroom is facilitated with 2 air-conditioners and a projector. Apart from this, the library and all labs are quite decent. All labs are equipped with internet facilities. In addition, there are two canteens on the campus, which are quite beneficial for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied due to the experienced teachers available here.

review_content.Placements: I think approximately 57% of students were placed from our college. In the current year, about 10% of students were eligible for placements, whereas only 5% of students got placed. Alicon and Amar Cars are recruiting companies here. Only 3% of the students got internships from here. Industrial and design courses are offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, there have been numerous amenities such as free Wi-Fi for all students, a library and different labs for all courses of students. I think the quality of accommodation provided in hostels is not appropriate. However, the meals provided by the canteen were delicious.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Knowledge Institute Of Technology And Engineering.

content.Placements: Our institute provides good jobs through placements. Many big companies and other colleges also take students from here for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of both the college and hostel is good and new features are added like projectors, laptop labs, and many more. A canteen and a food zone are available at our institute. A playground is also available there.
content.Faculty: The principal graduated from IIT, and very highly educated staff members are available here. They have very good experience in their subject. They are helpful.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied to study in this college in the year 2022.

content.Placements: It is a good college for placements. During the last semester, they invite many companies for internships and after that for placements also. In our batch, 30 students out of 17 got selected for placements before their final semester.
content.Infrastructure: We have a great infrastructure with all facilities needed with a better study atmosphere. We have a big library and even an auditorium with a central air-conditioner, and all classrooms have air-conditioners. We have a canteen and garden where we can hang out with friends.

The highest salary package offered is 3.6 LPA by a company from Ahmedabad for an assistant app developer. The lowest salary package offered by several local companies of our town is 2-3 LPA. Some students were hired as assistant developers, whereas few got a job in the teaching department.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite well-balanced. Each classroom is facilitated with 2 air-conditioners and a projector. In addition, there are two canteens on the campus, which are quite beneficial for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best civil college in anand city.

content.Placements: My branch is really demanding field in my state and over 25% of students got placement from my college. The students of my college got placement in several local companies. Nearly one quarter of students took internship in near GIDC companies for more than 3 months.
content.Infrastructure: There are several labs in my college for different purposes. Whole campus is well-equipped with medium speed internet. All classrooms have 2 air conditioner and 1 projector with cctv cameras. Our library has really limited but very helpful resources. In addition, there are two canteen available in my college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Knowledge Institute Of Technology And Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Knowledge Institute Of Technology And Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of both the college and hostel is good and new features are added like projectors, laptop labs, and many more. A canteen and a food zone are available at our institute. A playground is also available there.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied to study in this college in the year 2022.
reviews.review_text: We have a great infrastructure with all facilities needed with a better study atmosphere. We have a big library and even an auditorium with a central air-conditioner, and all classrooms have air-conditioners. We have a canteen and garden where we can hang out with friends.

reviews.review_heading: The college is quite good for the comprehensive growth of students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite well-balanced. Each classroom is facilitated with 2 air-conditioners and a projector. Apart from this, the library and all labs are quite decent. All labs are equipped with internet facilities. In addition, there are two canteens on the campus, which are quite beneficial for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied due to the experienced teachers available here.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there have been numerous amenities such as free Wi-Fi for all students, a library and different labs for all courses of students. I think the quality of accommodation provided in hostels is not appropriate. However, the meals provided by the canteen were delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Best civil college in anand city.
reviews.review_text: There are several labs in my college for different purposes. Whole campus is well-equipped with medium speed internet. All classrooms have 2 air conditioner and 1 projector with cctv cameras. Our library has really limited but very helpful resources. In addition, there are two canteen available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to study then it is a proper place for you.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well equipped with Projectors, air conditioner and with CCTV camera and labs are also good. And there is LAN internet connection in Labs. Library is not that much large and it is average. There are 2 canteens one is small in which snacks are available and in another there is totally full dish food available. And quality of food is good. Sports and games are not that much facilitated.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with good and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There are perfect laboratories for all courses. There is a perfect canteen.  A parking area and a huge playground are available. So, the infrastructure is all good and is the same as students want. I didn't experience it personally, but the canteen is common, and the canteen food is healthy and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: The college for good academics and betterment of our future.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is well designed and well-equipped with ample amount of instruments. Every class and corridors are under surveillance of CCTV cameras. All classrooms have 2 air conditioner and with one projector. There are two canteens as well, which provide wide variety of food.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for knowledge with the lowest fee in whole Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: There is no sports ground here, but there are 3 separate computer labs. One lab has 100 PCs with a 40 Mbps speed data package. You can use it without any problem, and no one will disturb you whatever you watch on PC. The canteen also offers good food. The most important thing is that our college is far from the city area, and there is not any food court nearby. The campus is small. However, you will find every solution to your life here. So, you can join here with the lowest fees and most amazin...

admission_process.title: Mahath Amma Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahath Amma Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Mahath Amma Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,00,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.
